commands.name: configure
commands.description:
Configures the tool with the provided values as
defaults for later use.

options.name: --client-id
options.description:
Required. Sets the client id for the tool
client (required).

options.name: --client-secret
options.description:
Required. Sets the client secret for the tool
client (required).

options.name: --authority
options.description:
Required. Sets the issuing authority for the
tool (required).

options.name: --redirect-url
options.description:
(Default: http://localhost:65001/signin) Sets
the redirect url for the authentication flow
(optional). Default value is
`http://localhost:65001/signin`

options.name: --code-challenge-method
options.description:
(Default: S256) Sets the code challenge method
(optional). Default value is S256
